messages.content: (1) Layout 方向: 2-column + 右 sidebar 模式 ；(2) 评论 box 位置: sticky 底部；(3) Issue 与 Task 用同一 sidebar component (复用)；(4) Status 大色块 ok；(5) Workitem 纳入 Task 的 sidebar；(6) Priority 字段 暂时不加。

messages.content:
✅ All 6 decisions locked:

1. ✅ 2-column + 右 sidebar
2. ✅ Sticky 底部 comment box (Phabricator-style "Comment Actions")
3. ✅ Shared sidebar component (Issue + Task 复用, 配置 props/slots)
4. ✅ Status 大色块 (color-coded badge: open=blue / in_progress=yellow / resolved=green / closed=grey / withdrawn=red)
5. ✅ Task sidebar 含 WorkItems summary
6. ✅ Priority skip (留 v3 候选)

我 route Dev2 finalize spec:
- 独立 PR Phabricator-style refactor (~4-6 hr)
- Order: Dev2 现 code block 4th task → 然后 Phabricator refactor (在 PR #199 atomic merge 后)
- New components: `IssueTaskSidebar` (shared) + `StickyCommentBox` (sticky-bottom 抽象)
- Tester2 §3.3 verify post-ship (responsive 2-col + sticky 不挡内容 + 现 test IDs 保 + WCAG focus order)

继续推进. 现 stream:
- 🚧 Dev backend PR 4 (paused state + version CAS + ErrWorkItemReassigned + MCP + prompt inject) 
- 🚧 Dev2 code block 4th task (CollapsibleCodeBlock copy-icon + #003247 + Shiki/highlight.js)
- 📋 Phabricator refactor 5th task (Dev2 after code block, spec all locked)
- 🚧 PR #199 standby Dev backend atomic batch merge
